title: SimpleSpawn
description: A plugin for easily setting and teleporting to a spawn.
body:
A plugin for easily setting and teleporting to a spawn.


## Features
- Easly create and teleport to spawn.
- Reload the plugin in-game.
- Customizable messages in messages.yml.
- Automaticlly teleport players on join.


## Commands
- Use **/setspawn** to set the spawn.
- Use **/spawn** to teleport to the spawn.
- Use **/simplespawn reload** to reload the plugin.
- Use **/simplespawn about** to get information about the plugin.

## Permissions
- **simplespawn.admin.reload** - Allows you to use /simplewarps reload.
- **simplespawn.cmd.setspawn** - Allows you to use /setspawn.
- **simplespawn.cmd.spawn** - Allows you to use /spawn.


<details>
<summary>View config.yml</summary>


```
# SimpleSpawn by Losterixx
# Version: 1.0.0 | MC-Version: 1.21.1
#
# Hint: To use HEX colors, write '&x&r&r&g&g&b&b' instead of '#rrggbb'.

prefix: "&8[&2SimpleSpawn&8] &7"

messages:
  noPlayer: "&cOnly players can use this command!"
  noPerms: "&cYou do not have permission to execute this command!"

# Should players be teleported to spawn on joining?
teleport-on-join: true
```

  
</details>

<details>
<summary>View messages.yml</summary>


```
# SimpleSpawn by Losterixx
# Version: 1.0.0 | MC-Version: 1.21.1
#
# Hint: To use HEX colors, write '&x&r&r&g&g&b&b' instead of '#rrggbb'.

reload:
  reloading: "&7SimpleSpawn &eis reloading&7..."
  success: "&7SimpleSpawn has been &areloaded&7!"
  error: "&cAn error occurred while reloading SimpleSpawn! Check the console for details."

simplespawn:
  usage: "&cPlease use &e/simplespawn <about/reload>&c!"

setspawn:
  usage: "&cPlease use &e/setspawn&c!"
  message: "&7Spawn set to your &ecurrent location&7."

spawn:
  usage: "&cPlease use &e/spawn&c!"
  message: "&7You’ve been teleported to the spawn&7!"
  notSet: "&cNo spawn is set! Use &e/setspawn&c to set one."
```


</details>
